textByHash.182be75f03b4b7b566a1a65ad1aed31f49161dcc: Good question! Ents are ancient beings that resemble trees, we believe they draw their energy directly from nature.
textByHash.29783a91057c357574d13a1a2c41495ba365a06d: Of course! There's no shortage of them residing within the dungeon, and they're a fantastic source of wood.
textByHash.299f6bde36a68c3a84ad572a22cb789c6a1d471a: Hi there, my name is Kai and I'm the keeper of this here ent habitat.
textByHash.41719cf8f009c82dd2129aa75b5b8e7b9c218bce: Another good question! We're not sure exactly, we just know they're a very old race.
textByHash.6d625f0307a5e1a15ac19c49edcea286a5781cf6: I have heard of similar creatures roaming a desolate part of the eastern continent, though.
